title: Mace but 3D
description: Adds a clean 3D model that appears while holding the mace
body:
# Mace but 3D
This was previously a mod but since snapshot 24w45a it's now possible in vanilla.


Many players including myself were disappointed when they found out the mace wasn't going to have a 3D model in 1.21. Well this resource-pack fixes that.
Mace but 3D is a resource-pack that adds a clean 3D model to the mace. The custom model appears only while holding it, giving it a more vanilla feel.

![First Person view while holding the mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4066ba684fa433c18ac13220d272bbf1c620637.png)

For example, while in an item frame, the mace retains its normal model like the trident and the spyglass.

![Mace in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0438550290a2b653d6e201cfbff805c7f61eb4.png)
